prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! Every moment you delay is a moment wasted, and you're stronger than the resistance holding you back. This task might seem daunting, but you're capable of handling it. Take a deep breath, break it down into smaller steps, and just start. Once you begin, you'll build momentum, and before you know it, you'll be making progress. Remember, the hardest part is often just getting started. You'll feel so much better once you tackle this, and the sense of accomplishment will be worth it. Believe in yourself, focus, and take it one step at a time. You can do this!
